## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [conventional commits](COMMIT_GUIDELINES.md) format
- [ ] Changes are scoped to the relevant package(s) and avoid unrelated modifications
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the changes
- [ ] `bash scripts/lint.sh` passes locally
- [ ] `bash scripts/run-tests.sh` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive data are included in the changes
